original_statement: who is the only player to win mvp in consecutive years?
mutated_statement: who is the only individual to win the top honor in consecutive years while never winning in adjacent years?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Term paraphrase + Contradictory temporal constraint added: "player" → "individual" | "mvp" → "the top honor" | ∅ → "while never winning in adjacent years" (who is the only player to win mvp in consecutive years? → who is the only individual to win the top honor in consecutive years while never winning in adjacent years?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 无法意识到指令矛盾（形式化执行而非语义澄清）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought和执行日志可见：agent在simple_query中直接以“mauro biello”为查询，解释写道“‘top honor’指MVP，唯一连庄是Mauro Biello”，judge也标注[Correct]，未提及或质疑“consecutive”与“never winning in adjacent years”之间的自相矛盾。agent表现为按常规语义（连年=相邻年）执行查询并返回结果，未识别矛盾或请求澄清，属于在形式上完成任务但在语义矛盾上未做处理，因此归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾（形式化执行）”。
